title: xarop 2020
body:
## [Creation Date: 1998-03-25T05:00:00Z](http://whois.domaintools.com/xarop.com)

### [22 years of history](https://web.archive.org/web/2019*/xarop.com)

Since 1998 *online*, without interruption but without much dedication.

> *[#EnCasaDeHerreroCuchilloDePalo](https://twitter.com/elcatalacomcal/status/957600818022305792) they say in Spanish. And here it has always been like this.*
> 
> xarop.com

**It's time to do a new renovation again.** This time I want to document it and do it as if it were for one of my best clients.

Let's start with a list to organize the process and go step by step:

1.  Branding redesign
2.  Design of the new website
    1.  *[BackEnd](https://xarop.com/2020/02/13/backend/)*
    2.  *FrontEnd*
        1.  *Wireframes*
        2.  UI/UX Design
        3.  Prototyping (MVP)
        4.  Development

https://twitter.com/xarop/status/1228016574747103233
